creator: sonic2000gr@gmail.com
text:
I just tried the procedure in VirtualBox.
In my case, it was the backup GPT that got corrupted - the system was 
still bootable but of course no gm* devices were created, had to use the 
standard ad* ones.
You are right we should warn about this, I will  add this info to the 
"warning" already present in the section.
